title: fragaria viridis subvar. flagellifera
intro: Fragaria viridis subvar. flagellifera, also known as the green strawberry or green flagellifera strawberry, is a subspecies of the wild strawberry plant native to East Asia, characterized by its green fruit and long, thin stems. The medicinal properties of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of consuming Fragaria viridis subvar. flagellifera include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and provide anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied and verified.
